_meta.description: Sample scan outputs demonstrating ChronosPay policy gate decisions

scenarios.trigger: Developer accidentally committed a Stripe API key

block_reasons: [PCI Req.8] Secret detected at src/config/processors.py:42 — hardcoded credentials violate PCI Req. 8.2.1 and create immediate credential exposure risk in CDE.

remediation.immediate: Rotate Stripe API key immediately — treat as compromised
remediation.code_fix: Remove from source. Use os.environ['PROCESSOR_API_KEY'] instead.
remediation.prevention: Pre-commit hook (see .pre-commit-config.yaml) catches this before push

scenarios.scenario: BLOCK — Critical CVE in cryptography library
scenarios.trigger: requirements.txt pins cryptography==38.0.0 which has CVE-2023-49083

Vulnerabilities.Title: NULL pointer dereference in PKCS12 parsing
Vulnerabilities.Description: cryptography is a package designed to expose cryptographic primitives and recipes to Python developers. Calling `load_pem_pkcs12` or `load_der_pkcs12` could lead to a NULL-pointer dereference and segfault.

block_reasons: [PCI Req.6/11] CVE-2023-49083 (CRITICAL) in cryptography@38.0.0 — critical vulnerability in CDE component. Fix: upgrade to 41.0.6

remediation.pci_note: cryptography library is PCI-sensitive — handles cardholder data encryption

scenarios.trigger: Image scan detects USER is not set — container runs as root (UID 0)

Misconfigurations.Title: Image should not be run as root
Misconfigurations.Description: Running containers with 'root' user can cause privilege escalation issues.
Misconfigurations.Message: Specify at least 1 USER command in Dockerfile with non-root user as argument
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Add 'USER <non root user name>' line to the Dockerfile

block_reasons: [PCI Req.6] Container image runs as root (UID 0) — violates CIS Docker Benchmark 4.1 and PCI Req. 6.2 (least privilege). Add USER 10001 to Dockerfile.

remediation.dockerfile_fix: Add before CMD: RUN useradd --uid 10001 chronospay && USER 10001:10001

scenarios.scenario: WARN — High CVE, no known exploit
scenarios.trigger: httpx dependency has a HIGH CVE but EPSS score is 0.04 (low exploit probability)

Vulnerabilities.Title: SSRF via malicious redirect in httpx
Vulnerabilities.Description: httpx before 0.27.0 allows SSRF via following redirects to internal addresses.

warn_reasons: CVE-2024-35195 (HIGH) in httpx@0.26.0. EPSS=0.04. Fix available: 0.27.0

scenarios.pipeline_behavior: Deployment proceeds. Ticket auto-created: SEC-4821. SLA: fix within 30 days.

scenarios.trigger: All dependencies updated, no secrets, non-root container
scenarios.pipeline_behavior: Deployment proceeds to production. Audit event emitted to GCP Logging.
